description.initial: You descend into the deeper western waters of the Underwater Realm. The light fades here, replaced by the glow of bioluminescent creatures. Strange fish with lantern-like appendages drift past, their lights creating constellations in the darkness.
description.return: The deep western waters. Bioluminescent creatures light the eternal darkness.
description.atmospheric: Darkness presses in from all sides, held back only by living lights. The water grows colder.

interactables.name: Lantern Fish
interactables.examineText: Fish with bioluminescent organs drift through the darkness, their lights blinking in patterns that seem almost like communication.
